note: Pinned baseline used when the leaderboard file is not yet committed to the main branch (bootstrap). Once docs/leaderboard/cubrim-leaderboard.json is committed to main, gates read it via git show main: and this file becomes a dead fallback. Update this file in the gate dir (not in a candidate branch) whenever the baseline advances. NOTE: the aggregate is measured via the competitive rail (compress with --value-scheme bwt-rans, which selects the smallest of schemes 7..11 per file). The codec's bare default (no flag) is bitpack (0.556651); always measure champions through the competitive flag. gzip-CAVEAT: this aggregate (0.158273) edges gzip-9 (0.158290) by only 2 bytes on THIS 10-file corpus, and the win rests almost entirely on block_bound_runs; gzip is still smaller on most files. Do NOT claim Cubrim beats gzip in general — it is corpus-specific and fragile.

current_best.scheme: BwtGeoMix (scheme 11, logistic-mix; competitive rail over schemes 7..11)
